temple: Use roughness 0.3-0.5 for polished marble columns, 0.7-0.9 for weathered stone podium. Use surface_detail 0.4-0.7 on large stone surfaces.
basilica: Use roughness 0.5-0.7 for plastered walls, 0.3-0.4 for marble floors. Add surface_detail 0.5+ on exterior walls.
insula: APARTMENT BLOCK — NO colonnade. Roughness 0.7-0.9 for brick, 0.5-0.7 for plaster. Vary colors between floors. Simple tiled_roof, many windows.
domus: Roughness 0.4-0.6 for stucco, 0.3 for polished interior. Surface_detail 0.3-0.5 on exterior walls.
thermae: Roughness 0.2-0.4 for wet/glazed surfaces, 0.6-0.8 for exterior. Metalness 0.1+ for bronze fittings.
market: COMMERCIAL — NO colonnade. Roughness 0.7-0.9 for timber/rough surfaces. Add awning with contrasting color.
taberna: SMALL SHOP — NO colonnade, NO pediment. Single story, rough brick (roughness 0.8+), wide door, awning, flat_roof.
warehouse: STORAGE — NO colonnade, NO decorative elements. Tall plain block, thick walls, few windows, wide door, flat_roof. Roughness 0.8-0.95.
gate: FORTIFIED — NO colonnade. Roughness 0.5-0.7 for dressed stone. Arcade for arch, battlements. Surface_detail 0.5+ for ashlar.
wall: Roughness 0.8-0.95 for rough defensive walls. Surface_detail 0.6+ for rusticated stone.
monument: Roughness 0.2-0.4 for polished stone/bronze. Metalness 0.3-0.7 for bronze. NO colonnade unless explicitly described.
amphitheater: Roughness 0.5-0.7 for travertine. Layer arcade + tier + arcade for multi-story effect.
circus: ELONGATED TRACK — low walls with seating tiers, pilasters for rhythm. Roughness 0.5-0.7.
bridge: UTILITARIAN — arcade for arches, flat deck, low parapet walls. NO colonnade. Roughness 0.6-0.8.
_default: Roughness 0.5-0.8 for stone, 0.7-0.9 for weathered surfaces. Surface_detail 0.3-0.6 on large planes.
